zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Douglas於大約1346年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，她的父親Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell22歲，母親Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas16歲。她和Richard De Ruthirfurde至少有1個兒子。她去世於1421年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Douglas was born about 1346, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, was 22 and her mother, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, was 16. She had at least 1 son with Richard De Ruthirfurde. She died in 1421, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 76.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard De Ruthirfurde. Elle est décédée en 1421, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Douglas um 1346 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell 22 und ihre Mutter Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas 16. Sie hatte mit Richard De Ruthirfurde mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1421 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Lanarkshire, Scotland.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard De Ruthirfurde. Morì nel 1421, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 76 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Douglas(이)가 대략 1346년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Richard De Ruthirfurde(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Douglas родилась около 1346 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, 16. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard De Ruthirfurde. Она умерла в 1421 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 76 лет.
